meaning: n.运输,财产让与,运输工具
examples: Mahoney had never seen such a conveyance before.
He indicated that the little house must be used as a conveyance.
The miners rode a conveyance attached to a cable made of braided steel wire.
Most adventure races opt for more quotidian conveyance--foot, bicycle and inflatable kayak are standard.
But there was and is barely any public conveyance in Baton Rouge that might take one to the Greyhound station.
